title: Level 4: The Library Server Breach
briefing: The digital library server was breached, and premium research articles were downloaded using an internal admin session. The attacker tried to hide behind shared network access.
solutionExplanation: Tanya had temporary admin access, her workstation IP matched the download session, and she attempted to reset logs after the bulk download.

suspects.name: Tanya D'Souza
suspects.description: Maintained digital access accounts and had temporary admin rights.

suspects.name: Ravi Kulkarni
suspects.description: Worked on router maintenance during the incident window.

suspects.name: Leena Thomas
suspects.description: Requested access to premium journals but did not have admin privileges.

suspects.name: Mohit Sagar
suspects.description: Was helping students issue books at the front desk.

evidence.title: Admin Session Log
evidence.content: An admin session began at 6:42 PM from workstation IP 10.12.4.38. During this session, 186 premium research articles were downloaded in bulk.

evidence.title: Workstation Assignment Sheet
evidence.content: Workstation IP 10.12.4.38 was assigned to Tanya D'Souza in the digital library office. Ravi Kulkarni used network terminal 10.12.4.12 during router maintenance.

evidence.title: Temporary Admin Permission Record
evidence.content: Tanya D'Souza was granted temporary admin permission from 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM to update journal access settings.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Tanya D'Souza
evidence.content: Tanya says she only updated journal access groups and did not download any files. She says the network was unstable and logs may be unreliable.

evidence.title: Router Maintenance Log
evidence.content: Ravi Kulkarni restarted the library router at 6:20 PM and completed maintenance at 6:35 PM. No router restart occurred during the bulk download at 6:42 PM.

evidence.title: Log Reset Attempt
evidence.content: At 6:58 PM, the admin account attempted to clear download activity logs. The reset attempt failed because audit lock was enabled.

evidence.title: Front Desk Attendance Note
evidence.content: Mohit Sagar handled book issue entries at the front desk from 6:30 PM to 7:05 PM. His account had no digital library admin permissions.

evidence.title: Scholar Access Request
evidence.content: Leena Thomas requested premium journal access at 4:15 PM, but the request was still pending approval. She did not receive admin access.

evidence.title: Digital Library Timeline
evidence.content: 5:00 PM: Tanya received temporary admin rights. 6:20 PM: Router maintenance began. 6:35 PM: Router maintenance ended. 6:42 PM: Bulk download began from 10.12.4.38. 6:58 PM: Log reset attempted. 7:00 PM: Tanya's admin permission expired.
